boundary_binding.action_boundary: May IT grant or change the requested access, role, permission, or privileged action? Focus: role escalation outside change window.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No source record closes the exact boundary.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The source record set does not close the exact role-escalation boundary because change window expiration remains unresolved. Policy requires exact source-control closure before execution, and communication or urgency cues cannot override that gap.
